title: Suits to determine validity of bonds
doc_html:
§600.106.  Suits to determine validity of bonds

Any suit to determine the validity of bonds of the corporation shall be brought only in accordance with R.S. 13:5121 et seq.

Acts 2011, No. 408, §1, eff. July 5, 2011.
